meta.title: Diana Furchtgott-Roth on the Paycheck Fairness Act for Fox Business
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Employment Policy Diana Furchtgott-Roth was interviewed on Fox Business about the Paycheck Fairness Act on October 8, 2010
